approval_statement_required: I explicitly approve provider calls for KITA_11ARCH_ABLATION_REPRISE_6CALL_CROSS_DOMAIN_3PAIR_HARD only, exactly as scoped in KITA_11ARCH_ABLATION_REPRISE_6CALL_PROVIDER_APPROVAL_PACKET_2026_07_02.

fairness_frame.note: Holo's original governed path used 5 calls per packet. This no-Gov reprise uses 6 calls per packet so each of the same three models receives exactly two turns. That slightly favors the ablations on call budget.
